title: Colossal Biosciences reportedly in talks to raise new capital at $20B–$30B valuation
summary: De-extinction startup Colossal Biosciences is in talks to raise new funding at a $20 billion to $30 billion valuation, doubling or tripling its previous valuation. The funding round reflects growing investor interest in the company's ambitious efforts to resurrect extinct species through genetic technology.
content: The de-extinction startup is looking to double or triple its previous valuation, according to the report.

zh.title: 据报道，Colossal Biosciences正在谈判以200亿至300亿美元估值融资
zh.summary: 灭绝物种复活初创公司Colossal Biosciences正在谈判以200亿至300亿美元估值融资，是其之前估值的两倍或三倍。这一融资轮反映了投资者对该公司通过遗传技术复活已灭绝物种的雄心壮志的兴趣日益增长。

title: Trump’s latest AI czar has already resigned
summary: The director position for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation has seen another departure following David Sacks leaving his role as AI czar. The repeated turnover in this leadership position suggests challenges in maintaining continuity in the Trump administration's AI governance efforts.
content: The director role for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) has become a revolving door since David Sacks left his position as czar.

zh.title: Trump最新的AI沙皇已经辞职
zh.summary: 在David Sacks离职其AI沙皇职位后，AI标准与创新中心主任职位又出现人事变动。这一领导职位的反复更替表明Trump政府在维持AI治理工作连贯性方面存在挑战。

title: Here are the 30,000 songs Sony is suing Udio’s AI music generator over
summary: Sony Music Entertainment has filed a lawsuit against the AI music generator Udio, alleging copyright infringement of over 30,000 songs from artists including Elvis Presley, Beyoncé, and Harry Styles. The lawsuit represents the latest escalation in legal action by major labels against AI music tools, with Sony suggesting this list covers only a fraction of claimed infringements.
content:
Sony Music Entertainment has filed another lawsuit against Udio, accusing the AI music generator of infringing the copyright of more than 30,000 of its songs, ranging from Elvis Presley's Hound Dog to Beyoncé's Say My Name, and Harry Styles' As It Was. The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on Monday, claims that this list represents "only a small portion of Plaintiffs' works that Udio infringed," as reported earlier by Music Business Worldwide.
In 2024, Sony, along with Universal Music Group and Warner Records, filed a lawsuit against Udio and the AI music-maker Suno. After gaining access to Udio's training data through discovery, Sony cla …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼起诉Udio AI音乐生成器侵犯30000首歌曲版权
zh.summary: 索尼音乐娱乐公司起诉AI音乐生成器Udio侵犯包括猫王、碧昂丝和哈里·斯泰尔斯等艺术家的30000多首歌曲的版权。该诉讼代表了大型唱片公司对AI音乐工具法律行动的最新升级,索尼表示这份清单仅涵盖其声称侵权的一小部分。

title: The FCC is planning to retroactively ban disguised DJI gadgets
summary: The FCC is preparing to retroactively ban gadgets from DJI front companies that successfully circumvented a ban on Chinese drone technology by disguising their products. Building on earlier $25,000 fines against eight suspected shell companies, the agency is moving toward more severe penalties including potential permanent import bans.
content:
The Skyrover X1 vs the DJI Mini 4 Pro. | Image: AirPhotography	

Last October, we told you how the FCC had given itself the power to retroactively ban gadgets that have already received its approval to be imported and sold in the United States. Now, the FCC's getting ready to wield that power for the first time, by cracking down on the "DJI front companies" suspected of sneaking the Chinese company's tech past its foreign drone ban.
Two Fridays ago, the FCC had already proposed a $25,000 fine on eight of those "front companies," including the ones behind the Skyrover drones and Xtra cameras. But now, the FCC is proposing a lot more than a slap-on-the-wrist - it's planning to ban those same companies from …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 联邦通信委员会计划溯及既往禁止伪装的DJI设备
zh.summary: 联邦通信委员会准备溯及既往地禁止DJI壳公司的设备,这些公司通过伪装产品成功规避了对中国无人机技术的禁令。在对八家疑似壳公司处以25000美元罚款后,该机构正在采取更严厉的处罚措施,包括可能的永久进口禁令。

title: DA: Cop covered bodycam to snap nude prisoners on his iPhone—but other cams caught him
summary: A Pennsylvania police officer has been charged with oppression and obstruction after allegedly covering his bodycam while photographing nude prisoners on his iPhone, though other security cameras recorded his actions. The case highlights ongoing concerns about misuse of security systems and accountability within law enforcement.
content: Pennsylvania cop charged with oppression and obstruction.

zh.title: 检察官:警察盖住执法记录仪用iPhone拍裸体囚犯——但其他摄像头拍到了他
zh.summary: 宾夕法尼亚州一名警察被控压迫罪和妨碍司法罪,他涉嫌盖住执法记录仪,同时用iPhone拍摄裸体囚犯的照片,尽管其他安全摄像头记录了他的行为。该案件突显了执法部门对安全系统的滥用和问责问题的持续担忧。

title: Firefighting drones in the works as wildfires plague US nearly year-round
summary: California is testing firefighting drones through an XPRIZE competition to determine whether the technology can effectively combat wildfires before they spread. The initiative addresses the growing challenge of year-round wildfire seasons in the United States through autonomous aerial systems.
content: California and XPRIZE competition tests whether drones can stop wildfires early.

zh.title: 消防无人机正在开发中，美国全年受野火困扰
zh.summary: 加州正在通过XPRIZE竞赛测试消防无人机，以确定该技术是否能在野火蔓延前有效控制。该倡议通过自主航空系统解决美国全年野火季节日益增长的挑战。

title: The Odyssey turned me into an IMAX believer
summary: Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" achieves its full visual impact when viewed in IMAX format, resolving visual inconsistencies the reviewer noticed in standard theater projection. The film demonstrates why certain blockbusters are specifically crafted for large-format screens.
content:
After seeing Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey for the first time early last week, I came away impressed, but somewhat conflicted about two of the film's more fantastical set pieces. While those scenes were beautifully crafted and tremendously acted, there was something a little bit off about the way they hit my eye. I spent days wondering what, exactly, wasn't quite working for me during that first theatrical viewing, and I thought that might have just been splitting hairs. But it wasn't until I saw the movie again over the weekend - this time in IMAX - that the issue became crystal clear.
Though I'd heard all of the buzz about The Odyssey b …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《奥德赛》让我成为了IMAX的信徒
zh.summary: 克里斯托弗·诺兰的《奥德赛》在IMAX格式下才能实现其完整的视觉效果，解决了评论者在标准电影院放映中注意到的视觉不一致性。这部电影展示了为什么某些大片是专门为大屏幕制作的。

title: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
summary: Google's parent company Alphabet is developing a custom AI chip optimized to run its Gemini language models more efficiently. The move reflects the broader industry trend of companies building specialized silicon to reduce the computational costs of operating large AI models.
content: Alphabet, Google's parent company, is reportedly working on a new chip designed to make its Gemini models run much more efficiently.

zh.title: 谷歌正在开发新的AI芯片以提高Gemini效率

title: Judge halts Paramount's $111B purchase of Warner Bros. in win for US states
summary: A judge has granted a restraining order blocking Paramount's $111 billion acquisition of Warner Bros., finding the merger would likely violate antitrust laws. The decision represents a significant victory for US state attorneys general challenging the deal on competition grounds.
content: Judge grants restraining order, saying merger "likely to violate antitrust laws."

zh.title: 法官叫停派拉蒙斥资1110亿美元收购华纳兄弟公司的交易

title: SpaceX in your index fund, explained
summary: SpaceX's fast-tracked inclusion in the Nasdaq-100 raises questions about whether highly speculative companies can destabilize index funds typically viewed as low-risk investments. However, the article explains that the risk depends more on how index funds operate than on SpaceX's volatility alone.
content:
AUUUUUGH | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

Index funds are touted as one of the safest ways to invest. Rather than picking and choosing individual stocks, index funds let you bet on the market as a whole. So what happens when a company like SpaceX - a giant gamble, and, in my opinion, terribly overpriced - is fast-tracked into the Nasdaq-100? Does it suddenly threaten the stability of index funds based on the Nasdaq-100? Can a $1.77 trillion IPO crater the retirement funds of regular people who would ordinarily have no interest in investing in Elon Musk's meme stock?
The answer has less to do with SpaceX and more to do with index funds - how they work, their history, and why they've …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 你的指数基金中的SpaceX详解
zh.summary: SpaceX快速纳入纳斯达克100指数引发了人们对高度投机性公司是否会破坏通常被视为低风险投资的指数基金的疑虑。然而，该文章解释说风险更多取决于指数基金的运作方式，而不仅仅是SpaceX的波动性。

title: AI’s most important protocol is getting a little bit easier to use
summary: A key AI protocol is becoming easier to implement through a new "stateless" approach to session management that mirrors standard web architecture. The simplification could accelerate adoption of the protocol across the AI industry.
content: Under the new system, the protocol will take a looser, "stateless" approach to session IDs on the server side, similar to how most ordinary websites already work.

title: The Space Force is now seeking to buy up to $30 billion in rocket launches
summary: The Trump administration is requesting the Space Force to procure up to $30 billion in rocket launch services to meet expanding operational demands. The procurement reflects increased military space activity and the strategic importance of assured launch capability.
content: The Trump administration is asking the Space Force to do a lot. This will require more launches.

title: Get Borderlands 3, Risk of Rain 2 and 13 other great PC games for $15
summary: The "2K Megahits 2026 Bundle" offers 15 popular Steam games including Borderlands 3, Risk of Rain 2, and XCOM: Enemy Unknown for $15, available until August 7. Proceeds benefit Covenant House, which supports youth experiencing homelessness, while offering exceptional value compared to individual game prices.
content:
Borderlands 3 is among the 15 games in the 2K Megahits 2026 Bundle. | 2K Games	

The aptly-named “2K Megahits 2026 Bundle” from Humble includes 15 Steam games for $15. It’s a smattering of the publisher 2K’s biggest games of the 2010s, including BioShock Infinite, Risk of Rain 2, Borderlands 3, and XCOM: Enemy Unknown. The bundle will be available until August 7th, though the bundle page notes that keys for some games are already starting to run low. All of the games work on Windows, while some support MacOS and SteamOS.
2K Megahits 2026 Bundle

Where to Buy:

 $465 $15 at Humble

One of my personal favorite games, Risk of Rain 2, is included in the bundle. In the third-person roguelike, you’ll face off against increasingly difficult waves of enemies, fighting to stay alive as long as you can and collecting power-ups and useful perks before extracting to the next zone to do it all again. It’s just challenging enough to make victory satisfying, and fun to play alone or with friends. You also get 2012’s XCOM: Enemy Unknown, a legendary turn-based strategy game that’s usually $15 on its own, to give you a sense of the bundle’s value.
The bundle also notably includes three games from the Borderlands universe. Borderlands 3 Special Edition is a traditional looter-shooter FPS, Tiny Tina’s Wonderlands adds RPG elements like an overworld map and spellcasting, and Tales from the Borderlands is an interactive episodic visual novel from Telltale Games. You’ll also get a variety of shooters, including BioShock Infinite, Duke Nukem 3D, Bulletstorm, plus Hidden and Dangerous from the turn of the millenium.
Part of the proceeds from the bundle benefit Covenant House, an organization that benefits young people facing homelessness, as well as the publisher and Humble. You can adjust how you pledge is split between the beneficiaries by clicking the button that says “adjust donation” under the checkout button.
You can find the full list of games in the bundle below:
Risk of Rain 2
Bor

zh.title: 仅需15美元即可获得《无主之地3》《雨中冒险2》和其他13款优秀PC游戏
zh.summary: "2K Megahits 2026 Bundle"提供15款热门Steam游戏,包括《无主之地3》《雨中冒险2》和《XCOM:敌未来》,价格仅为15美元,活动截止日期为8月7日。收益用于支持Covenant House,该机构为无家可归的青年提供帮助,同时相比单个游戏的价格提供了超值的价格。

title: The PlayStation replica ornament is an homage to a great, yet fragile console
summary: A new PlayStation replica ornament recreates the iconic console's boot sequence with battery-powered sound effects, celebrating the hardware's cultural significance despite its reliability issues. The ornament serves as nostalgia for gamers who remember the console's distinctive audio and visual design.
content:
The ornament requires three 1.5-volt coin batteries, which are included in the box. | Photo: Cameron Faulkner/The Verge	

You probably know the signature PlayStation boot sound. Did you know that it's technically a multi-part chime? There's the synthy section where "Sony Computer Entertainment" shows onscreen with a white background. You only get to the next screen with the echo-y chimes and the color-filled PlayStation logo if your console recognizes the disc. How badly I wanted my sorta-broken console to get to that second screen.
My console's disc spindle came apart pretty early into me owning it. As an eight-year-old kid, fixing the spindle was the riskiest undertaking of my life yet. The internet wasn't really a haven for how-tos yet, so I superglued that …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: PlayStation复制品装饰品是对一款伟大但容易出故障的游戏机的致敬
zh.summary: 一款新的PlayStation复制品装饰品采用电池供电的音效重现了这款标志性游戏机的启动序列,庆祝该硬件的文化意义,尽管存在可靠性问题。这款装饰品唤起了那些还记得游戏机独特音频和视觉设计的玩家心中的怀旧情感。

content: Talk of banning Chinese-made open-weight LLMs reveals the challenge of  turning AI into a business.

title: Ford’s $30,000 electric truck: all the news about the company’s big EV re-do
summary: Ford is pivoting to a new Universal Electric Vehicle Platform with a planned $30,000 electric truck arriving in 2027, abandoning its unsuccessful strategy around large trucks. The shift follows a $19.5 billion loss on EV investments in 2025, forcing the automaker to focus on affordable, profitable vehicles.
content:
The end of the Ford F-150 Lightning was also the start of a new era for the automaker. After failing to capture the market with the electric version of its popular F-Series truck, Ford is going back to the drawing board with its Universal Electric Vehicle Platform. 
The first offering will be a $30,000 electric truck, engineered for efficiency and also — perhaps most importantly — profitability. The truck will be revealed in 2027, but Ford plans on building a whole family of low-cost electric vehicles at its Kentucky assembly plant. The heavily camouflaged truck has already been spotted out in the wild, with observers noting that it seems even smaller than the Maverick. 
Success isn’t guaranteed. Ford has struggled to make profitable EVs, forcing the company to take a staggering $19.5 billion hit on its EV investments in 2025. But Ford still sees EVs as the future — just not oversize ones with “no path to profitability,” as executives say. 


					
Emojis as camouflage.
			
Ford’s $30K electric truck could be smaller than a Maverick.
			
Inside the lab where Ford is trying to crack the code on cheap EVs
			
Ford’s EV and software chief Doug Field is leaving the company

Ford’s big bet on EVs didn’t pan out — now it’s pivoting to hybrids and energy storage

title: Judge pauses $110B Paramount-Warner Bros. merger
summary: A federal judge has temporarily halted the proposed $110 billion merger between Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery following a lawsuit from twelve state attorneys general. The states argued the deal would harm movie theaters, cable distributors, and consumers.

title: Judge pauses Paramount’s attempt to buy Warner Bros. Discovery
summary: Federal Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín granted a temporary restraining order against the $110 billion Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery merger, finding the combined entity's market share would likely violate antitrust laws. The ruling recognized irreparable harm to competition and consumers.
content:
A judge partially granted the request from a dozen state attorneys general to temporarily place the $110 billion merger of Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery on hold, as reported by Variety and Reuters. US District Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín said that based on the new company's market share, "the Court is persuaded that it can presume the proposed merger is likely to violate antitrust laws," and that the states showed "irreparable harm" could occur without a temporary restraining order.
A week ago, California, Arizona, Colorado, Connecticut, Massachusetts, Minnesota, Nevada, New Jersey, New Mexico, New York, Oregon, and Washington sued …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 法官暂停派拉蒙收购华纳兄弟发现频道的尝试
zh.summary: 联邦法官Araceli Martínez-Olguín对派拉蒙-华纳兄弟发现频道的1100亿美元合并案发出临时禁止令，认定合并后实体的市场份额可能违反反垄断法。该裁决认定此举将对竞争和消费者造成不可弥补的伤害。

title: LG’s glossy OLED gaming monitor is rare to find under $400
summary: LG's 27-inch glossy OLED gaming monitor is currently on sale for $379.99, delivering rare value for OLED displays with 1440p resolution, 240Hz refresh rate, and superior color accuracy. The price represents a significant discount from its original $799.99 launch.
content:
LG’s UltraGear Glossy OLED gaming monitor deliver deep, true-to-life blacks. | Image: LG	

If you’ve been thinking about upgrading your gaming monitor, LG’s 27-inch 27GX704A-B pairs a glossy WOLED panel with a fast refresh rate, and it’s currently on sale for $379.99 (about $70 off) at Amazon and directly from LG, marking a new low price. It originally launched at $799.99, but has been available for under $500 since May.
LG UltraGear Glossy OLED gaming monitor (27-inches)

Where to Buy:

 $449 $379.99 at Amazon
 $449 $379.99 at LG

The monitor offers a 1440p resolution and a glossy coating, which isn’t a combination of specs we often see at this price. Most OLED monitors under $400 use QD-OLED panels, which can give blacks a slight bluish tint. LG’s WOLED monitor delivers truer-looking blacks while the glossy coating helps colors appear richer and more vibrant.
It doesn’t sacrifice speed, either. The monitor boasts a fast 240Hz refresh rate with variable refresh rate support (Nvidia G-Sync compatible and AMD FreeSync Premium Pro), along with a fast 0.03ms response time to keep games looking sharp in motion. 
It comes with a solid array of ports for the price, with two HDMI 2.1 ports, DisplayPort 1.4, and USB-A ports, making it easy to connect a PC, consoles, and accessories. Rounding things out, the stand is fully adjustable, too, allowing you to raise, lower, tilt, swivel, or rotate the display into portrait mode for a more comfortable setup. Or, because it has a VESA mount, you can yank it off and toss it onto a monitor arm of your choice.

zh.title: LG的光泽OLED游戏显示器价格难得低于400美元
zh.summary: LG的27英寸光泽OLED游戏显示器目前以379.99美元的价格出售,以1440p分辨率、240Hz刷新率和优越的色彩准确度为OLED显示器提供难得的价值。该价格相比其原来的799.99美元发售价格有重大折扣。

title: LG’s monitors come with an unwanted addition for Windows: McAfee pop-up ads
summary: LG monitors are automatically installing the LG Monitor App Installer on Windows 11 systems through Windows Update without user permission, which then displays unsolicited McAfee antivirus ads. The practice represents a significant privacy concern for consumers.
content:
This LG 34GX900A-B is one of the monitors found auto-installing LG’s app on users’ PCs. | Image: LG	

A video from Gamers Nexus explains how, after connecting a new LG UltraGear monitor to a PC running Windows 11 for the first time, Windows Update is silently installing LG driver updates and the LG Monitor App Installer, without so much as a permission pop-up or notification. The app doesn't appear to include special controls of its own, instead simply pointing users to LG's other apps, as well as McAfee antivirus.

There are reports about LG's app auto-installing as far back as 2024, but Gamers Nexus's test follows recent user complaints on Reddit about large pop-up ads for McAfee and LG's own apps suddenly appearing in the bottom right cor …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: LG显示器在Windows上附带不需要的额外内容:McAfee弹窗广告
zh.summary: LG显示器通过Windows Update在Windows 11系统上自动安装LG显示器应用程序安装程序,无需用户许可,然后显示不请自来的McAfee杀毒软件广告。这种做法对消费者隐私构成重大威胁。

title: Adobe’s ‘natural look’ camera app embraces generative AI
summary: Adobe's Project Indigo camera app is adding generative AI tools through an "AI Playground" feature, expanding beyond its original focus on SLR-like photography for iPhones. The update tests free AI capabilities with opt-out functionality for users.
content:
Welcome to the “what is a photo” debate, Adobe. | Image: Adobe	

Adobe's experimental camera app has taken an unexpected turn. After Project Indigo was launched last year to provide a "more natural (SLR-like) look" for iPhone photography, the Indigo camera app is now being updated with a suite of generative AI tools. And the change doesn't rely upon Adobe's own Firefly AI models.
Adobe describes the new "AI Playground" tooling suite as an experiment and says there's a button that allows users to opt out and continue using the app as before. Free access to the suite with no sign-on requirement is being tested with a small percentage of Indigo users over the next few weeks. "Our goal is to learn how people …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Adobe的"自然外观"相机应用拥抱生成式AI
zh.summary: Adobe的Project Indigo相机应用通过"AI Playground"功能添加生成式AI工具,超越其原有对iPhone类单反摄影的关注。该更新以选择退出功能为用户测试免费AI功能。

title: F1 in Belgium: Machine learning algorithms are ruining the sport
summary: Machine learning algorithms are creating adverse effects on Formula 1 racing at Spa, one of motorsport's most prestigious circuits. The unintended consequences are degrading the competitive experience for drivers and fans.
content: Many will say Spa is the best racetrack on earth, but not for these F1 cars.

zh.title: 比利时F1赛事：机器学习算法正在毁掉这项运动
zh.summary: 机器学习算法在享有盛誉的赛道斯帕的一级方程式赛车比赛中造成了负面影响。这些意外后果正在损害驾驶员和粉丝的竞争体验。

title: Adobe camera app’s new feature will critique your photos using AI
summary: Adobe's Project Indigo camera app now includes AI-powered background removal and photo critique capabilities. The generative AI features allow automated background modification of photos captured directly within the app.
content: Adobe's Project Indigo can now remove all kinds of backgrounds from photos you snap using the app.

zh.title: Adobe相机应用的新功能将使用AI评论你的照片
zh.summary: Adobe的Project Indigo相机应用现在包括AI驱动的背景去除和照片评论功能。生成式AI功能允许自动修改直接在应用内捕获的照片背景。

title: Hackers are exploiting recently patched WordPress bugs, putting millions of websites at risk
summary: Hackers are actively exploiting two recently patched critical vulnerabilities in WordPress, potentially compromising tens of millions of websites globally. The security flaws enable remote takeover, making immediate patching essential for website operators.
content: Two critical security flaws in WordPress’ software have given hackers the chance to remotely take over tens of millions of websites, according to an estimate by a cybersecurity researcher.

zh.title: 黑客正在利用最近修复的WordPress漏洞，使数百万网站面临风险
zh.summary: 黑客正在积极利用WordPress中两个最近修复的关键漏洞，可能危害全球数千万个网站。安全漏洞允许远程接管，使网站运营商必须立即进行修补。

title: AliExpress hit with record $625M fine after failing to make EU-ordered fixes
summary: AliExpress has received a record €625 million fine from the EU under the Digital Services Act for failing to implement court-ordered compliance measures. The penalty is the largest DSA fine issued to date, signaling aggressive enforcement against major online retailers.
content: Online retailer AliExpress says it's shocked by largest DSA fine yet.

zh.title: 速卖通因未按欧盟命令进行修正而遭创纪录6.25亿欧元罚款
zh.summary: 速卖通因未能实施法院下达的合规措施而从欧盟获得创纪录的6.25亿欧元罚款，该罚款是迄今为止发布的最大数字服务法罚款，标志着对主要在线零售商的积极执法。

title: YouTube clarifies policies around AI slop and upsetting videos
summary: YouTube has updated its monetization policies to explicitly define which AI-generated and low-quality videos cannot earn ad revenue. The clarification directly addresses proliferation of "AI slop" and low-effort content on the platform.
content: YouTube has updated its monetization policies to more clearly define the kinds of AI-generated and low-quality videos that can’t earn ad revenue.

zh.title: YouTube澄清关于AI生成垃圾内容和不适当视频的政策
zh.summary: YouTube已更新其货币化政策，明确定义哪些AI生成和低质量视频无法获得广告收入。这一澄清直接解决了该平台上"AI垃圾"和低效能内容的泛滥问题。

title: Inference startup Infinity raises $15M from Touring Capital, OpenAI and Anthropic researchers
summary: AI infrastructure startup Infinity raised $15 million at a $100 million valuation from investors including Touring Capital and researchers from OpenAI and Anthropic. The funding supports development of inference infrastructure for AI applications.
content: AI infrastructure company Infinity announced Monday a $15 million raise at a $100 million valuation from investors including Touring Capital, Principal VC, and researchers from companies such as OpenAI and Anthropic.

zh.title: 推理初创公司Infinity从Touring Capital以及OpenAI和Anthropic研究人员处融资1500万美元
zh.summary: AI基础设施初创公司Infinity以1亿美元估值从包括Touring Capital以及OpenAI和Anthropic研究人员在内的投资者融资1500万美元。这笔融资支持AI应用推理基础设施的开发。

title: Hackers stole ‘significant’ amount of data from tech firm relied on by thousands of US hospitals and pharmacies
summary: Craneware, an Edinburgh-based software company serving thousands of U.S. hospitals, pharmacies, and clinics, suffered a cyberattack in which significant customer data was stolen. The breach potentially exposed sensitive health and billing information used by healthcare providers.
content: Edinburgh-based tech firm Craneware said customer data was stolen during a cyberattack. The company makes software that thousands of U.S. hospitals, pharmacies, and clinics rely on for billing patients, potentially exposing health data.

zh.title: 黑客从被数千家美国医院和药房依赖的科技公司窃取了"大量"数据
zh.summary: 总部位于爱丁堡的软件公司Craneware为美国数千家医院、药房和诊所提供服务，遭遇了一次网络攻击，大量客户数据被盗。这次泄露可能暴露了医疗保健提供者使用的敏感的健康和账单信息。

title: The first trailer for Avengers: Doomsday is finally here
summary: Marvel Studios released the first trailer for Avengers: Doomsday, with cryptic messaging suggesting an imminent threat to the superhero team. The trailer launch marks a major milestone in promoting the next installment of the MCU's flagship franchise.
content: "Something's coming. Something we may not be able to deter."

zh.title: 复仇者联盟：末日审判首支预告片终于发布
zh.summary: 漫威工作室发布了《复仇者联盟：末日审判》的首支预告片，其中包含暗示对超级英雄团队迫在眉睫威胁的神秘信息。预告片的发布标志着宣传这部MCU旗舰系列下一部作品的重要里程碑。

title: Watch Flock Safety CEO Garrett Langley discuss the future of surveillance at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
summary: Flock Safety CEO Garrett Langley will discuss the future of surveillance at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, addressing the tension between public safety and privacy rights. The talk highlights ongoing debates about where regulatory boundaries should be set in surveillance technology.
content: Flock Safety sits right at the center of the debate over where the line should be drawn between privacy and public safety. That’s why we’re bringing Flock’s founder and CEO Garrett Langley to the stage to speak about those very issues.

zh.title: 观看Flock Safety首席执行官加勒特·兰利在TechCrunch Disrupt 2026上讨论监控的未来
zh.summary: Flock Safety首席执行官加勒特·兰利将在TechCrunch Disrupt 2026上讨论监控的未来，并解决公共安全与隐私权之间的紧张关系。这场演讲突出了关于监控技术监管边界应该设在何处的持续辩论。

title: Pay up or not? Ransomware surge has victims facing tough choices.
summary: Governments are considering policies to ban ransom payments as sophisticated ransomware attacks force organizations into difficult decisions about paying attackers. The regulatory push reflects concerns that payments fund criminal enterprises and perpetuate the ransomware threat cycle.
content: Governments look at banning ransom payments in face of increasingly sophisticated threats.

zh.title: 支付还是不支付？勒索软件激增让受害者面临困难选择
zh.summary: 随着复杂的勒索软件攻击迫使组织面临是否向攻击者付款的困难决定，政府正在考虑禁止赎金支付的政策。这种监管推动反映了人们对支付会资助犯罪企业并延续勒索软件威胁循环的担忧。

title: Electric air taxis go to war
summary: Archer Aviation and Anduril unveiled Thunder, a hybrid military-commercial aircraft combining air taxi capabilities with military vertical takeoff and landing technology. The platform expansion signals that electric aviation manufacturers are exploring defense applications beyond city transportation.
content:
Electric aviation is still in its infancy, but manufacturers are already looking beyond mere air taxi trips across cities. Today, one of the leading air taxi startups, San Jose-based Archer Aviation, unveiled a new aircraft it co-developed with defense technology company Anduril - though the platform is designed for both military and commercial uses, the companies said. 
The new aircraft looks like a cross between Archer's Midnight air taxi and a more established military vertical takeoff and landing aircraft like a V-22 Osprey. Anduril, which was founded by Palmer Luckey, unveiled the new variant, called Thunder, on Monday at the Farnborou …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 电动空中出租车展开竞争
zh.summary: Archer Aviation和Anduril推出了Thunder，这是一款混合军用-商用飞行器，结合了空中出租车功能和军事垂直起降技术。该平台的扩展表明电动航空制造商正在探索超越城市运输的防御应用。

title: Avengers: Doomsday’s first trailer puts everyone on high alert
summary: Marvel released the first official trailer for Avengers: Doomsday, featuring Robert Downey Jr. as Doctor Doom causing widespread chaos. The film shows multiple hero teams from the X-Men, Fantastic Four, and Avengers in conflict, with Thor attempting to unite them against their shared Latverian threat.
content:
After months of teasing us with reminders about how large Avengers: Doomsday's cast is going to be, Marvel has finally released a proper trailer for the film.
Though Robert. Downey Jr.'s Doctor Doom definitely appears to be causing a lot of the chaos in Doomsday's first trailer, the movie seems like it's going to feature more than a few moments where different teams of heroes fight one another. Thor (Chris Hemsworth) seems to be the only person who understands that the X-Men, the Fantastic Four, and the (New) Avengers need to be more focused on dealing with their new Latverian enemy. And while Thor might not be able to rally the troops on h …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《复仇者联盟：末日》首支预告片亮相，引发高度警惕
zh.summary: 漫威发布了《复仇者联盟：末日》的首支官方预告片，由罗伯特·唐尼饰演的末日博士造成广泛混乱。这部电影展示了来自X战警、神奇四侠和复仇者联盟的多支英雄团队发生冲突，雷神试图将他们团结起来对抗共同的拉脱维亚威胁。

title: Hugging Face confirms breach affected internal datasets and credentials, urges users to take action
summary: Hugging Face confirmed a security breach compromising internal datasets and user credentials, urging customers to immediately rotate access tokens and review account activity. The incident underscores growing security concerns within the AI development community.
content: Hugging Face is urging users to rotate any access tokens stored on the platform and review account activity.

zh.title: Hugging Face确认安全漏洞 敦促用户立即采取行动
zh.summary: Hugging Face确认了一起安全漏洞事件，危及了内部数据集和用户凭据，敦促客户立即轮换访问令牌并审查帐户活动。该事件凸显了人工智能开发社区内日益增长的安全问题。

title: StrictlyVC returns to New York City September 10 to celebrate a huge year for the city’s startup community
summary: StrictlyVC is returning to New York City on September 10 for its first in-person event since 2024, providing direct access to the startup, venture capital, and dealmaking communities. The event celebrates a strong year for NYC's startup ecosystem.
content: For the first time since 2024, StrictlyVC is coming back to New York City — and we're bringing the kind of access you’d expect from an under-wraps event to the whole startup, VC, and dealmaking community.

zh.title: StrictlyVC 9月10日回归纽约庆祝该市创业社区的丰收年
zh.summary: StrictlyVC 将于 9 月 10 日回归纽约举办自 2024 年以来的首次线下活动,为创业、风险投资和交易社区提供直接接触机会。该活动庆祝纽约创业生态的强劲表现。

title: Beyond grep: The case for a context-rich AI coding harness
summary: Augment Code's Vinay Perneti discusses how AI coding harnesses are evolving beyond basic search functionality with enhanced contextual understanding. The shift reflects how improved context integration is reshaping AI-assisted development practices.
content: Augment Code's Vinay Perneti talks models, harnesses, and context.

zh.title: 超越 grep:打造上下文丰富的 AI 编码工具的案例
zh.summary: Augment Code 的 Vinay Perneti 讨论了 AI 编码工具如何通过增强上下文理解能力超越基础搜索功能。这一转变反映了改进的上下文集成如何重塑 AI 辅助开发实践。

title: AliExpress fined almost $630 million over illegal product sales
summary: The European Commission fined AliExpress €550 million ($629 million) for Digital Services Act violations, citing the platform's failure to prevent illegal, unsafe, and counterfeit product sales. The penalty nearly doubles previous fines for similar infractions, reflecting stricter EU enforcement on e-commerce platforms.
content:
The fine is more than double the penalty that Temu was slapped with for similar DSA violations. | Illustration: The Verge	

AliExpress has been hit with a €550 million (about $629 million) fine for violating Europe's Digital Services Act (DSA) rules by failing to prevent illegal, unsafe, or counterfeit products from being sold on the e-commerce platform. The European Commission ruled that AliExpress didn't take effective measures to reduce the dissemination of illegal products, noting the company "allocated insufficient staff" to verify products, and failed to remove unsafe toys and dangerous cosmetics for "multiple weeks" after they were detected.
"The spread of counterfeit clothing, unsafe toys, dangerous cosmetics and other illegal and harmful products is not …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AliExpress 因非法产品销售被罚近 6.3 亿美元
zh.summary: 欧盟委员会因违反《数字服务法》对 AliExpress 处以 5.5 亿欧元(6.29 亿美元)的罚款,理由是该平台未能防止非法、不安全和假冒产品销售。该罚款几乎是之前类似违规罚款的两倍,反映了欧盟对电子商务平台更严格的执法力度。

title: China delivers a one-two punch to America’s AI dominance
summary: Chinese AI companies Moonshot and Alibaba are challenging American AI dominance with new models claiming comparable performance to OpenAI and Anthropic systems at significantly lower costs. The rapid releases suggest the U.S. technological lead is narrowing amid intensifying geopolitical competition in AI capability.
content:
China's leading AI companies are ramping up the pressure on Silicon Valley, as Moonshot and Alibaba unveiled models they claim can go toe-to-toe with the best from OpenAI and Anthropic at a fraction of the cost. The rapid-fire releases suggest America's lead at the AI frontier is increasingly tight, just as the technology is becoming central to national security, economic power, and geopolitical influence. 
The opening salvo came from Beijing-based Moonshot AI, one of China's leading AI model developers, which unveiled Kimi K3 on Friday. Moonshot claims its own testing ranks it consistently above nearly every US system, trailing only OpenAI …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 中国对美国AI霸权的组合拳
zh.summary: 中国AI公司Moonshot和阿里巴巴正在挑战美国AI主导地位，推出性能与OpenAI和Anthropic系统相当但成本大幅更低的新模型。在地缘政治AI能力竞争日益加剧的背景下，这些快速的产品发布表明美国的技术领先优势正在缩小。
